value.name: approvedestablishment-microservice-availability
value.query:
requests
| where url contains "approvedestablishment-microservice"
| where name == "GET DefaultResource/defaultGet"
| where success == False

value.name: azure-search-average-response-time
value.description: azure search average response time exceeded 20 seconds
value.query:
dependencies
| where customDimensions contains "search.windows.net"
| where timestamp > ago(1h) 
| summarize avgRequestDuration=avg(duration) by bin(timestamp, 1m)
| where avgRequestDuration > 2000

value.name: file-upload-average-response-time
value.description: file upload average response time exceeded 20 seconds
value.query:
requests
| where timestamp > ago(1h) 
| where url contains "frontend-upload.imp.static-test.azure.defra.cloud/protected/upload"
| where name startswith "POST"
| summarize avgRequestDuration=avg(duration) by bin(timestamp, 1m)
| where avgRequestDuration > 20000

value.name: sql-average-response-time
value.description: sql average response time exceeded 2 seconds
value.query:
dependencies
| where name contains "SQL: jdbc:sqlserver"
| where timestamp > ago(1h) 
| summarize avgRequestDuration=avg(duration) by bin(timestamp, 1m)
| where avgRequestDuration > 2000

value.name: invalid-certificate-detected
value.description: an invalid certificate has been generated for soap service
value.query:
traces
| where message contains "INVALID CERTIFICATE DETECTED"

value.name: traces-code15-error
value.description: a code 15 error (FAILED_TOO_MANY_RESULTS) has been generated when polling traces
value.query:
traces
| where message contains "Request to traces poll failed with operation code 15"

value.name: azure-search-503
value.query:
traces
| where message contains "Operation failed because the service is busy. Please wait and retry your request later."
| where message contains "503"
| where customDimensions.LoggerName == "uk.gov.defra.tracesx.notification.service.azure.search.AzureSearchIndexService"
